# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

---

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- Describe new features added in the unreleased version.

### Changed
- Describe changes made to existing features.

### Deprecated
- List features that will be removed in future releases.

### Removed
- List features removed in this version.

### Fixed
- List bug fixes implemented.

### Security
- Detail security patches or improvements.

---

## [1.0.0] - 2026-06-30

### Added
- Initial stable release.
- Core authentication endpoints.
- Database schema and migrations setup.
